title: Autoscaling Workloads — Scaling workloads automatically
text:
Kubernetes also supports
automatic scaling
of workloads, which is the focus of this page.
The concept of
Autoscaling
in Kubernetes refers to the ability to automatically update an
object that manages a set of Pods (for example a
Deployment
).

In Kubernetes, you can automatically scale a workload horizontally using a
HorizontalPodAutoscaler
(HPA).
It is implemented as a Kubernetes API resource and a
controller
and periodically adjusts the number of
replicas
in a workload to match observed resource utilization such as CPU or memory usage.
There is a
walkthrough tutorial
of configuring a HorizontalPodAutoscaler for a Deployment.
